name: Hornmarsh
description: A warm, waterlogged planet of endless river deltas where hollow reeds catch the wind and boom across the water like horns, so the whole world hums day and night. Giant lily pads carpet the slow channels, fish leap in the amber light, and thick humid air hangs over miles of mud and reed. Nothing here is owned or traded — it is pure overgrown wilderness, teeming and loud.
mood: Warm, humid, and droning — fertile and teeming, but heavy with the constant low hum of the reeds.
biome: Sprawling river deltas and mudflats give way to towering reed forests, lily-choked lagoons, tangled root mangroves, and steaming mineral springs — all warm, green-gold, and alive with sound.

enemies.name: Mud Frog
enemies.role: small hopping melee that closes distance fast and swarms
enemies.description: Warty brown frog with bulging eyes.

enemies.name: Biting Gnats
enemies.role: tiny flying swarm dealing chip damage and lowering accuracy

enemies.name: Reed Snake
enemies.role: fast, low-HP biter that darts in and out

enemies.name: Leech
enemies.role: slow crawler that latches on and drains HP over several turns

enemies.name: Bog Toad
enemies.role: tongue lashes out to pull a target into melee range

enemies.name: Skipjack
enemies.role: leaps from the water for a surprise lunge, then dives back to safety

enemies.name: Marsh Heron
enemies.role: long beak gives extra reach for hard single-target stabs

enemies.name: Snapping Lily
enemies.role: rooted ambusher disguised as a lily pad, big bite when anything steps adjacent
enemies.description: Pink-white bloom hiding a toothed maw.

enemies.name: Marsh Crocodile
enemies.role: heavy bite that grapples and holds a target in place

enemies.name: Boomreed
enemies.role: hollow reed-stalk creature that releases an AoE sound blast to stun nearby foes

enemies.name: Giant Catfish
enemies.role: water-bound bruiser with a wide tail-sweep AoE

enemies.name: Water Constrictor
enemies.role: large snake that coils to immobilize and crush over time

enemies.name: Massive Crocodile
enemies.role: apex reptile with a devastating bite and sweeping tail

enemies.name: Marsh Serpent
enemies.role: huge multi-tile river serpent that lunges and swallows weakened foes

enemies.name: Reed Giant
enemies.role: towering hulk of woven reeds and mud, booming AoE blasts that knock enemies back

enemies.name: Mud Behemoth
enemies.role: slow tank that slams the ground and spawns Mud Frogs each turn

items.name: Reed Cutter
items.description: A light reed-handled shortsword, quick but weak.

items.name: Fishing Spear
items.description: A barbed spear made for stabbing fish in the shallows.

items.name: Reed Bow
items.description: A simple bow bent from a dried reed, fires fast.

items.name: Reed Staff
items.description: A hollow reed staff that hums and cracks on impact.

items.name: Bog Maul
items.description: A heavy mud-caked club, slow but hard-hitting.

items.name: Gator-Tooth Sword
items.description: A blade lined with crocodile teeth that tears wounds open.

items.name: Heron Spear
items.description: A long thin spear with extra reach to poke from afar.

items.name: Fowler's Bow
items.description: A short hunting bow built for rapid follow-up shots.

items.name: Marsh Staff
items.description: A staff topped with a heavy seed-pod that splashes mud and slows.

items.name: Boat Oar
items.description: A broad oar that sweeps several enemies in one swing.

items.name: Gator Jaw
items.description: A whole crocodile jaw on a haft, brutal crushing bite.

items.name: Trident
items.description: A three-pronged fishing fork that strikes targets in a line.

items.name: Bronze Saber
items.description: A curved brass-bright blade, keen and well balanced.

items.name: Horn Bow
items.description: A composite bow of horn and reed with long range and heavy draw.

items.name: Brass Horn
items.description: A great brass horn that blasts a wave of sound through nearby foes.

items.name: Bronze Greatsword
items.description: A massive bronze blade that crushes through wide arcs.
